sections.paragraph:
Original: יסכּה

Transliteration: yiskâh

Phonetic: yis-kaw'

BDB Definition:

Iscah = "one who looks forth"
  1. daughter of Haran, niece of Abraham, sister of Lot and Milcah

Origin: from an unused root meaning to watch

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
